posts.author: mroden (Mark Roden)
posts.cookedHtml:
When setting up new boards, it would be useful (as an admin user) to see be able test board views to ensure that the permissions are set correctly.

For instance if a board has info relating to a person you need to ensure that the permissions only allow the particular person to see their own data . Being able to test this as an admin user would ensure the permissions are set correctly.
